text: vbshnt 'cht lkhvrsh mlkh frs lkhlvt dbr-yhvh mfy yrmyh h'yr yhvh 't-rvch khrsh mlkh-frs vy'br-qvl bkhl-mlkhvtv vgm-bmkhtb l'mr
khh 'mr khrsh mlkh frs khl mmlkhvt h'rts ntn ly yhvh 'lhy hshmym vhv'-fqd 'ly lbnvt-lv byt byrvshlm 'shr byhvdh
my-bkhm mkhl-'mv yhy 'lhyv 'mv vy'l lyrvshlm 'shr byhvdh vybn 't-byt yhvh 'lhy yshr'l hv' h'lhym 'shr byrvshlm
vkhl-hnsh'r mkhl-hmqmvt 'shr hv' gr-shm ynsh'vhv 'nshy mqmv bkhsf vbzhb vbrkhvsh vbbhmh 'm-hndbh lbyt h'lhym 'shr byrvshlm

vkhl-sbybtyhm chzqv bydyhm bkhly-khsf bzhb brkhvsh vbbhmh vbmgdnvt lbd 'l-khl-htndb    s

vyqm yshv' bn-yvtsdq v'chyv hkhhnym vzrbbl bn-sh'lty'l v'chyv vybnv 't-mzbch 'lhy yshr'l lh'lvt 'lyv 'lvt khkhtvb btvrt mshh 'ysh-h'lhym
vykhynv hmzbch 'l-mkhvntyv khy b'ymh 'lyhm m'my h'rtsvt [vy'l kh] (vy'lv  q) 'lyv 'lvt lyhvh 'lvt lbqr vl'rb
vy'shv 't-chg hskhvt khkhtvb v'lt yvm byvm bmsfr khmshft dbr-yvm byvmv
v'chrykhn 'lt tmyd vlchdshym vlkhl-mv'dy yhvh hmqdshym vlkhl mtndb ndbh lyhvh
myvm 'chd lchdsh hshby'y hchlv lh'lvt 'lvt lyhvh vhykhl yhvh l' ysd
vytnv-khsf lchtsbym vlchrshym vm'khl vmshth vshmn ltsdnym vltsrym lhby' 'tsy 'rzym mn-hlbnvn 'l-ym yfv' khrshyvn khvrsh mlkh-frs 'lyhm  f

vbshnh hshnyt lbv'm 'l-byt h'lhym lyrvshlm bchdsh hshny hchlv zrbbl bnsh-'lty'l vyshv' bn-yvtsdq vsh'r 'chyhm  hkhhnym vhlvym vkhl-hb'ym mhshby yrvshlm vy'mydv 't-hlvym mbn 'shrym shnh vm'lh lntsch 'l-ml'kht byt-yhvh  f
vy'md yshv' bnyv v'chyv qdmy'l vbnyv bny-yhvdh kh'chd lntsch 'l-'shh hml'khh bbyt h'lhym    s   bny chndd bnyhm v'chyhm hlvym
vysdv hbnym 't-hykhl yhvh vy'mydv hkhhnym mlbshym bchtstsrvt vhlvym bny-'sf bmtsltym lhll 't-yhvh 'l-ydy dvyd mlkh-yshr'l
vy'nv bhll vbhvdt lyhvh khy tvb khy-l'vlm chsdv 'l-yshr'l vkhl-h'm hry'v trv'h  gdvlh bhll lyhvh 'l hvsd byt-yhvh    s
vrbym mhkhhnym vhlvym vr'shy h'bvt hzqnym 'shr r'v 't-hbyt hr'shvn bysdv zh hbyt b'ynyhm bkhym bqvl gdvl vrbym btrv'h bshmchh lhrym qvl
v'yn h'm mkhyrym qvl trv't hshmchh lqvl bkhy h'm khy h'm mry'ym trv'h gdvlh vhqvl nshm' 'd-lmrchvq  f

vygshv 'l-zrbbl v'l-r'shy h'bvt vy'mrv lhm nbnh 'mkhm khy khkhm ndrvsh l'lhykhm [vl' kh] (vlv  q) 'nchnv zbchym mymy 'sr chdn mlkh 'shvr hm'lh 'tnv fh
vy'mr lhm zrbbl vyshv' vsh'r r'shy h'bvt lyshr'l l'-lkhm vlnv lbnvt byt l'lhynv khy 'nchnv ychd nbnh lyhvh 'lhy yshr'l kh'shr tsvnv hmlkh khvrsh mlkh-frs
vyhy 'm-h'rts mrfym ydy 'm-yhvdh [vmblhym kh] (vmbhlym q) 'vtm lbnvt
vskhrym 'lyhm yv'tsym lhfr 'tstm khl-ymy khvrsh mlkh frs v'd-mlkhvt dryvsh mlkh-frs
vbmlkhvt 'chshvrvsh btchlt mlkhvtv khtbv shtnh 'l-yshby yhvdh vyrvshlm    s
vbymy 'rtchshsht' khtb bshlm mtrdt tb'l vsh'r [khnvtv kh] (khnvtyv q) 'l- ['rtchshsht' kh] ('rtchshsht  q) mlkh frs vkhtb  hnshtvn khtvb 'rmyt vmtrgm 'rmyt  f
rchvm b'l-t'm vshmshy sfr' khtbv 'grh chdh 'l-yrvshlm l'rtchshsht' mlkh' khnm'
'dyn rchvm b'l-t'm vshmshy sfr' vsh'r khnvthvn dyny' v'frstkhy' trfly' 'frsy' ['rkhvy kh] ('rkhvy' q) bbly' shvshnkhy' [dhv' kh] (dhy' q) 'lmy'
vsh'r 'my' dy hgly 'snfr rb' vyqyr' vhvtb hmv bqryh dy shmryn vsh'r 'br-nhrh vkh'nt
dnh frshgn 'grt' dy shlchv 'lvhy 'l-'rtchshsht' mlkh' ['bdykh kh] ('bdkh  q) 'nsh 'br-nhrh vkh'nt  f
ydy' lhv' lmlkh' dy yhvdy' dy slqv mn-lvtkh 'lyn' 'tv lyrvshlm qryt' mrdt' vb'ysht'  bnyn [vshvry kh] (vshvry' q) ['shkhllv kh] (shkhllv q) v'shy' ychytv
kh'n ydy' lhv' lmlkh' dy hn qryt' dkh ttbn' vshvryh yshtkhllvn mndh-blv vhlkh l' yntnvn v'ftm mlkhym thnzq
kh'n khl-qbl dy-mlch hykhl' mlchn' v'rvt mlkh' l' 'rykh-ln'  lmchz' 'l-dnh shlchn' vhvd'n' lmlkh'
dy ybqr bsfr-dkhrny' dy 'bhtkh vthshkhch bsfr dkhrny' vtnd' dy qryt' dkh qry' mrd' vmhnzqt mlkhyn vmdnn v'shtdvr 'bdyn bgvh mn-yvmt 'lm' 'l-dnh qryt' dkh hchrbt
mhvd'yn 'nchnh lmlkh' dy hn qryt' dkh ttbn' vshvryh yshtkhllvn lqbl dnh chlq b'br nhr' l' 'yty lkh  f
ftgm' shlch mlkh' 'l-rchvm b'l-t'm vshmshy sfr' vsh'r khnvthvn dy ytbyn bshmryn vsh'r 'br-nhrh shlm vkh't    s
nshtvn' dy shlchtvn 'lyn' mfrsh qry qdmy
vmny shym t'm vbqrv vhshkhchv dy qryt' dkh mn-yvmt 'lm' 'l-mlkhyn mtnsh'h vmrd v'shtdvr mt'bd-bh
vmlkhyn tqyfyn hvv 'l-yrvshlm vshlytyn bkhl 'br nhrh vmdh blv vhlkh mtyhb lhvn
kh'n shymv t'm  lbtl' gbry' 'lkh vqryt' dkh l' ttbn' 'd-mny t'm' ytshm
vzhyryn hvv shlv lm'bd 'l-dnh lmh yshg' chbl' lhnzqt mlkhyn    s
'dyn mn-dy frshgn nshtvn' dy ['rtchshsht' kh] ('rtchshsht q) mlkh' qry qdm-rchvm vshmshy sfr' vkhnvthvn 'zlv bbhylv lyrvshlm  'l-yhvdy' vbtlv hmv b'dr' vchyl    s
b'dyn btlt 'bydt byt-'lh' dy byrvshlm vhvt btl' 'd shnt trtyn lmlkhvt dryvsh mlkh-frs  f
vhtnby chgy [nby'h kh] (nby' q) vzkhryh br-'dv' [nby'y' kh] (nbyy' q) 'l-yhvdy' dy byhvd vbyrvshlm bshm 'lh yshr'l 'lyhvn    s
b'dyn qmv zrbbl br-sh'lty'l vyshv' br-yvtsdq vshryv lmbn' byt 'lh' dy byrvshlm v'mhvn [nby'y' kh] (nbyy' q) dy-'lh' ms'dyn lhvn   f
bh-zmn' 't' 'lyhvn ttny fcht 'br-nhrh vshtr bvzny vkhnvthvn vkhn 'mryn lhm mn-shm lkhm t'm byt' dnh lbn' v'shrn' dnh lshkhllh    s
'dyn khnm' 'mrn' lhm mn-'nvn shmht gbry' dy-dnh bnyn' bnyn
v'yn 'lhhm hvt 'l-shby yhvdy' vl'-btlv hmv 'd-t'm' ldryvsh yhkh v'dyn ytybvn nshtvn' 'l-dnh  f
frshgn 'grt' dy-shlch ttny  fcht 'br-nhrh vshtr bvzny vkhnvth 'frskhy' dy b'br nhrh 'l-dryvsh mlkh'
ftgm' shlchv 'lvhy vkhdnh khtyb bgvh ldryvsh mlkh' shlm' khl'    s
ydy'  lhv' lmlkh' dy-'zln' lyhvd mdynt' lbyt 'lh' rb' vhv' mtbn' 'bn gll v'' mtshm bkhtly' v'bydt' dkh 'sfrn' mt'bd' vmtslch bydhm    s
'dyn sh'ln' lshby' 'lkh khnm' 'mrn' lhm  mn-shm lkhm t'm byt' dnh lmbnyh v'shrn' dnh lshkhllh
v'f shmhthm sh'ln' lhm  lhvd'vtkh dy nkhtb shm-gbry' dy br'shyhm    s
vkhnm' ftgm' htybvn' lmmr 'nchn' hmv 'bdvhy dy-'lh shmy' v'r'' vbnyn byt' dy-hv' bnh mqdmt dnh shnyn shgy'n vmlkh lyshr'l rb bnhy vshkhllh
lhn mn-dy hrgzv 'bhtn' l'lh shmy' yhb hmv byd nbvkhdntsr mlkh-bbl [khsdy' kh] (khsd'h q) vbyth dnh strh v'mh hgly lbbl    s
brm bshnt chdh lkhvrsh mlkh' dy bbl khvrsh mlkh' shm t'm byt-'lh' dnh lbn'
v'f m'ny' dy-byt-'lh' dy dhbh vkhsf' dy nbvkhdntsr hnfq mn-hykhl' dy byrvshlm vhybl hmv lhykhl' dy bbl hnfq hmv khvrsh mlkh' mn-hykhl' dy bbl vyhybv lshshbtsr shmh dy fchh shmh
v'mr-lh  ['lh kh] ('l q) m'ny' ' 'zl-'cht hmv bhykhl' dy byrvshlm vbyt 'lh' ytbn' 'l-'trh    s
'dyn shshbtsr dkh 't' yhb 'shy' dy-byt 'lh' dy byrvshlm vmn-'dyn v'd-kh'n mtbn' vl' shlm
vkh'n hn 'l-mlkh' tb ytbqr  bbyt gnzy' dy-mlkh' tmh dy bbbl hn 'yty dy-mn-khvrsh mlkh' shym t'm lmbn' byt-'lh' dkh byrvshlm vr'vt mlkh' 'l-dnh yshlch 'lyn'    s
b'dyn dryvsh mlkh' shm t'm vbqrv  bbyt sfry' dy gnzy' mhchtyn tmh bbbl
vhshtkhch b'chmt' bbyrt' dy bmdy mdynth mglh chdh vkhn-khtyb bgvh dkhrvnh  f
bshnt chdh lkhvrsh mlkh' khvrsh mlkh' shm t'm byt-'lh' byrvshlm byt' ytbn' 'tr dy-dbchyn dbchyn v'shvhy msvblyn rvmh 'myn shtyn ftyh 'myn shtyn
ndbkhyn dy-'bn gll tlt' vndbkh dy-'' chdt vnfqt' mn-byt mlkh' ttyhb
v'f m'ny byt-'lh' dy dhbh vkhsf' dy nbvkhdntsr hnfq mn-hykhl' dy-byrvshlm vhybl lbbl yhtybvn vyhkh lhykhl' dy-byrvshlm l'trh vtcht bbyt 'lh'    s
kh'n ttny fcht 'br-nhrh shtr bvzny vkhnvthvn  'frskhy' dy b'br nhrh rchyqyn hvv mn-tmh
shbqv l'bydt byt-'lh' dkh fcht yhvdy' vlshby yhvdy' byt-'lh' dkh ybnvn 'l-'trh
vmny shym t'm lm' dy-t'bdvn 'm-shby yhvdy' 'lkh lmbn' byt-'lh' dkh vmnkhsy mlkh' dy mdt 'br nhrh 'sfrn' nfqt' thv' mtyhb' lgbry' 'lkh dy-l' lbtl'
vmh chshchn vbny tvryn vdkhryn v'mryn  l'lvn  l'lh shmy' chntyn mlch  chmr vmshch khm'mr khhny' dy-byrvshlm lhv' mtyhb lhm yvm  byvm dy-l' shlv
dy-lhvn mhqrbyn nychvchyn l'lh shmy' vmtslyn lchyy mlkh' vbnvhy
vmny shym t'm dy khl-'nsh dy yhshn' ftgm' dnh ytnsch '' mn-byth vzqyf ytmch' 'lhy vbyth nvlv yt'bd 'l-dnh
v'lh' dy shkhn shmh tmh ymgr khl-mlkh v'm dy  yshlch ydh lhshnyh lchblh byt-'lh' dkh dy byrvshlm 'nh dryvsh shmt t'm 'sfrn' yt'bd  f
'dyn ttny fcht 'br-nhrh shtr bvzny vkhnvthvn lqbl dy-shlch dryvsh mlkh' khnm' 'sfrn' 'bdv
vshby yhvdy' bnyn vmtslchyn bnbv't chgy [nby'h kh] (nby' q) vzkhryh br-'dv' vbnv vshkhllv mn-t'm 'lh yshr'l vmt'm khvrsh vdryvsh v'rtchshsht' mlkh frs
vshytsy' byth dnh 'd yvm tlth lyrch 'dr dy-hy' shnt-sht lmlkhvt dryvsh mlkh'  f
v'bdv bny-yshr'l khhny' vlvy' vsh'r bny-glvt' chnkht byt-'lh' dnh bchdvh
vhqrbv lchnkht byt-'lh' dnh tvryn m'h dkhryn m'tyn 'mryn 'rb' m'h vtsfyry 'zyn [lchty' kh] (lcht'h q) 'l-khl-yshr'l try-'shr lmnyn shbty yshr'l
vhqymv khhny' bflgthvn vlvy' bmchlqthvn 'l-'bydt 'lh' dy byrvshlm khkhtb sfr mshh  f
vy'shv bny-hgvlh 't-hfsch b'rb'h 'shr lchdsh hr'shvn
khy hthrv hkhhnym vhlvym kh'chd khlm thvrym vyshchtv hfsch lkhl-bny hgvlh vl'chyhm hkhhnym vlhm
vy'khlv bny-yshr'l hshbym mhgvlh vkhl hnbdl mtm't gvy-h'rts 'lhm ldrsh lyhvh 'lhy yshr'l
vy'shv chg-mtsvt shb't ymym bshmchh khy  shmchm yhvh vhsb lb mlkh-'shvr 'lyhm lchzq ydyhm bml'kht byt-h'lhym 'lhy yshr'l  f
v'chr hdbrym h'lh bmlkhvt 'rtchshst' mlkh-frs 'zr' bn-shryh bn-'zryh bn-chlqyh
bn-shlvm bn-tsdvq bn-'chytvb
bn-'mryh bn-'zryh bn-mryvt
bn-zrchyh bn-'zy bn-bqy
bn-'byshv' bn-fynchs bn-'l'zr bn-'hrn hkhhn hr'sh
hv' 'zr' 'lh mbbl vhv'-sfr mhyr btvrt mshh 'shr-ntn yhvh 'lhy yshr'l vytn-lv hmlkh khyd-yhvh 'lhyv 'lyv khl bqshtv  f
vy'lv mbny-yshr'l vmn-hkhhnym vhlvym vhmshrrym vhsh'rym vhntynym 'l-yrvshlm bshnt-shb' l'rtchshst' hmlkh
vyb' yrvshlm bchdsh hchmyshy hy' shnt hshby'yt lmlkh
khy b'chd lchdsh hr'shvn hv' ysd hm'lh mbbl vb'chd lchdsh hchmyshy b' 'l-yrvshlm khyd-'lhyv htvbh 'lyv
khy 'zr' hkhyn lbbv ldrvsh 't-tvrt yhvh vl'sht vllmd byshr'l chq vmshft    s
vzh  frshgn hnshtvn 'shr ntn hmlkh 'rtchshst' l'zr' hkhhn hsfr sfr dbry mtsvt-yhvh vchqyv 'l-yshr'l  f
'rtchshst' mlkh mlkhy' l'zr' khhn' sfr dt' dy-'lh shmy' gmyr vkh'nt
mny shym t'm dy khl-mtndb bmlkhvty mn-'mh yshr'l vkhhnvhy vlvy' lmhkh lyrvshlm 'mkh yhkh
khl-qbl dy mn-qdm mlkh' vshb't y'thy shlych lbqr' 'l-yhvd vlyrvshlm bdt 'lhkh dy bydkh
vlhyblh khsf vdhb dy-mlkh' vy'tvhy htndbv l'lh yshr'l dy byrvshlm mshkhnh
vkhl khsf vdhb dy thshkhch bkhl mdynt bbl 'm htndbvt 'm' vkhhny' mtndbyn lbyt 'lhhm dy byrvshlm
khl-qbl dnh 'sfrn' tqn' bkhsf' dnh tvryn  dkhryn 'mryn vmnchthvn vnskhyhvn vtqrb hmv 'l-mdbchh dy byt 'lhkhm dy byrvshlm
